title: EB production OAuth client secret fix — Google OAuth login restoration
description: Restore production Google OAuth login on https://ectropy.ai. Root cause: BW item 301125de (ECTROPY_PROD_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET) was written 2026-03-16 to a value ending ...ZlSsh; GCP OAuth client secret created 2026-03-18 ended ****hRsy — values never matched, OAuth login had never worked from day one (~80 days). Fix: L4 rotated BW via desktop UI; command-substitution propagated BW to GH (TF_VAR_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET); re-fired deploy-production-app.yml --ref ed6fc33; TF apply to Spaces to config-sync to Watchtower restart on blue+green; login verified working 2026-06-04 21:19 PDT. SR retro-anchor per EB-pre-SR-ship deviation (memory #24): alpha environment, operational fix-forward, L4-authorized real-time.

outputs.description: Production Google OAuth login working at https://ectropy.ai.
acceptanceCriteria: L4 browser-confirmed login and dashboard at https://ectropy.ai 2026-06-04 21:19 PDT post-container-restart with corrected GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.

outputs.description: Root cause documented and learn-from FUs filed.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause (BW initial-write 2026-03-16 never matched GCP secret created 2026-03-18) documented in SPEC.md and parent FU FU-EB-PROD-OAUTH-CLIENT-SECRET-2026-03-16.

Three learn-from FUs filed in PR #301: FU-EB-BW-OAUTH-SECRET-INITIAL-WRITE-NEVER-MATCHED-GOOGLE-1 (P3), FU-EB-OAUTH-SECRET-ENVSCOPED-NAMING-1 (P3), FU-EB-DEPLOY-PROD-APP-HEALTH-VALIDATION-CURL-NO-FOLLOW-1 (P2).

outputs.description: Closure recorded in FU register: FU-EB-PROD-OAUTH-CLIENT-SECRET-2026-03-16 filed and closed.
acceptanceCriteria: FU-EB-PROD-OAUTH-CLIENT-SECRET-2026-03-16 filed and closed in PR #303 with closedDate, closedDuring, summary fields populated.
ajv validation passes against follow-up-register.schema.json on resulting register state.

preMerge: Applier SHA-drift refusal verified in sandbox against baseline SHA.
Scope-locked to three files per memory #18.
PR CI passes all required checks without --admin override.
postMerge: Login verified working at https://ectropy.ai post-container-restart.
FU-EB-PROD-OAUTH-CLIENT-SECRET-2026-03-16 shows status=closed in eb-agent query.
SR retro-anchor and TRUTH-DELIVERED land per cross-repo doctrine memory #24.

transitions.trigger: SR retro-anchor authored post-EB-execution per EB-pre-SR-ship deviation (alpha environment, operational fix-forward, L4-authorized real-time 2026-06-04 21:00-21:19 PDT)
EB executed fix operationally without SR-anchor-first pass (S5 collapsed per EB-pre-SR-ship pattern, 7th+ in-band confirmation of FU-SR-PROCESS-EB-PRE-SR-SHIP-PATTERN-1)
EB closure PR #303 merged at 824419d21: SPEC.md + TRUTH-DELIVERED.json + FU-EB-PROD-OAUTH-CLIENT-SECRET-2026-03-16 filed+closed on EB main
SR retro-landing: deliverable instance + TRUTH-DELIVERED land at schemas/_instances/ on SR main

notes: SR retro-anchor. EB executed the OAuth fix without SR-anchor-first per cross-repo doctrine memory #24. Alpha environment, operational fix-forward, L4-authorized real-time 2026-06-04 21:00-21:19 PDT. Substrate-correction discipline (memory #25) was decisive: initial five-whys assumed GCP rotation drift based on internal env-chain self-consistency; L4 forced GCP Console source-of-truth read which surfaced that BW initial-write 2026-03-16 never matched GCP secret created 2026-03-18. Lesson: internal-chain self-consistency is necessary but not five-whys-sufficient for OAuth secret debugging. 7th+ confirmation of FU-SR-PROCESS-EB-PRE-SR-SHIP-PATTERN-1 (external-blocked, orthogonal to this closure). overrideRecord captured in TRUTH-DELIVERED instance per cross-repo-execution-shape skill.
